handoff.salientSummary: User testing validation for phasea-guardrails completed. All 3 Phase A assertions (VAL-PHASEA-001, VAL-PHASEA-002, VAL-PHASEA-003) verified as PASSED. Integration tests compile and run correctly with 2 witness tests passing and 10 wiring tests properly ignored pending Tier 1 implementation.
handoff.whatWasImplemented: User testing validation for phasea-guardrails milestone. Determined that all Phase A assertions are already validated (VAL-PHASEA-001, VAL-PHASEA-002, VAL-PHASEA-003 all pass). Ran `cargo test -p swell-integration-tests --test full_cycle_wiring` - 2 witness tests pass confirming current broken state (expected), 10 wiring tests properly ignored. Created synthesis report at .factory/validation/phasea-guardrails/user-testing/synthesis.json.
handoff.whatWasLeftUndone: Nothing - Phase A milestone has no pending assertions. Tier 1 implementation features will be validated when their features are completed.

commandsRun.observation: Test suite compiled and ran successfully. 2 witness tests passed (witness_daemon_does_not_depend_on_swell_llm, witness_orchestrator_does_not_hold_execution_controller), 10 wiring tests ignored (waiting for Tier 1 implementation).

tests.coverage: Phase A assertions verified via integration test compilation and execution. Phase A is guardrail establishment phase - no user-facing features to test via browser/CLI flows.
